articles.title: Former Boston Public Schools teacher sentenced to 10 years in prison for child exploitation
articles.description:
The former science teacher used a Discord account to have sexualized conversations with minors and receive sexually explicit images.

The post Former Boston Public Schools teacher sentenced to 10 years in prison for child exploitation appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Former Boston Public Schools teacher sentenced to 10 years for child exploitation.
Teacher used Discord to engage with minors, receiving explicit images.
Case raises concerns about online safety for Boston students and families.

articles.title: From slavery to the White House, the Ficklin family served presidents for nearly 8 decades
articles.description:
One family by the president’s side for one-third of America’s 250-year existence.

The post From slavery to the White House, the Ficklin family served presidents for nearly 8 decades appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: The Ficklin family served U.S. presidents for nearly 80 years, highlighting their historical significance.
Their service spans from slavery to the White House, reflecting America's complex history.
Boston residents can learn about this legacy at local museums and cultural events.
